title: Food labels - Canada.ca
content:
Food labels, food labelling requirements,  report a concern and access technical documents for industry.
Nutrition facts table, serving size, list of ingredients, nutrition claims and front of package nutrition symbol
Documents for industry that outline rules for specific labelling requirements.

### Food labelling requirements
Industry Labelling Tool for Canadian food inspectors and stakeholders.

### Report a food labelling concern
How to report a food label concern, including mislabelling issues

### Labelling genetically modified foods
Requirements for the labelling of GM foods

### Understanding the date labels on your food
Best before date, expiration date, packaged on date and more date labels

### Country of origin labelling
Requirements for certain food products to show the country of origin on their labels

### Shopping for Canadian food
How to tell what foods were grown, raised and prepared in Canada.

### Food allergen labelling
Food allergen labelling requirements

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
